# Forma Studio

> Award-winning interior design studio in Dubai.

## About
Forma Studio is a Dubai-based interior design practice founded in 2016. We specialize in luxury residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces across Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Business Bay.

## Services
- Full Interior Design
- FF&E Procurement
- Space Planning
- Project Management

## Contact
- Website: https://forma-studio.vercel.app
- Location: Downtown Dubai, UAE
- WhatsApp: +971XXXXXXXXX

## Portfolio
120+ completed projects across residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors. 3 design awards.
